data.biography:
Junior Panachai Sriariyarungruang is an actor and emcee under GMMTV. He has a bachelor's degree from Chulalongkorn University's Faculty of Communication Arts.

Junior first got into acting in university stage plays before making his onscreen debut in "I Hate You, I Love You" in 2016. He was signed under Nadao Bangkok from 2018 until they ended operations in 2022.
data.name: Panachai Sriariyarungruang
ปณชัย ศรีอาริยะรุ่งเรือง

data.biography: 小名Junior，全名為 Panachai Sriariyarungruang（帕納差·司隸亞楠讓），曾為Nadao Bangkok旗下泰國男藝人，現為GMMTV旗下男演員及模特。
小名 Junior，全名為 Panachai Sriariyarungruang（帕納差·司隸亞楠讓），曾為 Nadao Bangkok 旗下泰國男藝人，現為 GMMTV 旗下男演員及模特。
